title.en: EMLSR & EMLMR: One Radio, Many Links
title.zh: EMLSR 与 EMLMR：单射频如何同时盯住多条链路

blocks.en: Wi-Fi 7's multi-link operation (MLO) lets a device use two or three links — say 2.4, 5 and 6 GHz — at the same time. But true simultaneous transmit-and-receive on every link needs a full radio (and antennas, and power) for each one. A phone simply can't afford that. EMLSR and EMLMR are the clever compromises that let a power- or cost-constrained device still benefit from multiple links without paying for multiple full-time radios.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 的多链路操作（MLO）让设备能够同时使用两到三条链路——比如 2.4、5 和 6 GHz。但要在每条链路上都真正做到同时收发，就需要为每条链路配备一套完整的射频（外加天线和功耗）。手机根本承担不起这样的成本。EMLSR 与 EMLMR 正是两种巧妙的折中方案：让功耗或成本受限的设备在不必为多条链路各配一套全时射频的前提下，依然能享受到多链路带来的好处。

blocks.en: EMLSR — Enhanced Multi-Link Single-Radio — is the 'one good radio, many ears' trick. A non-AP device with multiple receive chains keeps a STA awake and listening on each of its EMLSR links. Listening here is cheap: it just does carrier sense (CCA) and watches for a short initial Control frame from the AP. It is not running a full-rate receiver on every link at once. When the AP wants to talk, it picks one link, sends that initial Control frame there, and the device then commits its good radio to that single link for the burst.
blocks.zh: EMLSR——增强型多链路单射频（Enhanced Multi-Link Single-Radio）——就是“一套好射频、多只耳朵”的把戏。一个具备多条接收链的非 AP 设备，会在它的每条 EMLSR 链路上保持一个 STA 处于唤醒并“侦听”的状态。这里的“侦听”很省电：它只做载波侦听（CCA），并留意 AP 发来的一帧简短的初始控制帧（initial Control frame），而不是在每条链路上同时运行一套全速率接收机。当 AP 想通信时，它选定一条链路、在那条链路上发出初始控制帧，设备随即把它那套好射频集中投入到这一条链路上完成本次突发传输。

blocks.en: Why an 'initial Control frame' first? Because the device is only half-listening on each link. The AP has to wake the chosen link before sending real data. That wake-up frame is an MU-RTS Trigger frame or a BSRP Trigger frame, sent in a robust non-HT (duplicate) PPDU at just 6, 12, or 24 Mb/s so the lightly-listening STA can reliably catch it.
blocks.zh: 为什么要先发一帧“初始控制帧”？因为设备在每条链路上都只是“半侦听”状态。AP 必须先唤醒被选中的那条链路，然后才能发送真正的数据。这帧唤醒帧是一个 MU-RTS 触发帧或 BSRP 触发帧，以稳健的 non-HT（duplicate）PPDU 格式、仅用 6、12 或 24 Mb/s 的速率发送，这样处于轻量侦听状态的 STA 才能可靠地捕获到它。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram participant L1 as EMLSR link A (listening) participant L2 as EMLSR link B (listening) participant AP as AP MLD Note over L1,L2: device listens on both: CCA only AP->>L1: initial Control frame (MU-RTS / BSRP, non-HT dup, 6-24 Mb/s) L1->>AP: immediate response (CTS / BSR) Note over L1: after SIFS + transition delay,
good radio committed to link A AP->>L1: full-rate data (multiple spatial streams) L1->>AP: BlockAck Note over L2: link B stays idle during the burst Note over L1,L2: end of exchange -> back to listening on both
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram participant L1 as EMLSR 链路 A (侦听中) participant L2 as EMLSR 链路 B (侦听中) participant AP as AP MLD Note over L1,L2: 设备在两条链路上侦听: 仅做 CCA AP->>L1: 初始控制帧 (MU-RTS / BSRP, non-HT dup, 6-24 Mb/s) L1->>AP: 立即响应 (CTS / BSR) Note over L1: SIFS + 切换时延之后,
好射频集中到链路 A AP->>L1: 全速率数据 (多条空间流) L1->>AP: 块确认 (BlockAck) Note over L2: 突发期间链路 B 保持空闲 Note over L1,L2: 交换结束 -> 回到在两条链路上侦听

blocks.en: There's a catch the standard handles carefully: switching from light listening to a full-rate receiver isn't instant. So after the STA sends its response to the initial Control frame, it is only required to be ready to receive a multi-spatial-stream PPDU a SIFS later — and the AP must pad the initial Control frame long enough to cover the device's declared EMLSR padding delay. During the burst the device works only on that one link and must not transmit or receive on the other EMLSR links. When the exchange ends, the device returns to listening on all links after its EMLSR transition delay.
blocks.zh: 标准还细致地处理了一个隐藏的难题：从轻量侦听切换到全速率接收并非瞬间完成。因此，STA 在对初始控制帧发出响应之后，只被要求在一个 SIFS 之后才准备好接收多空间流的 PPDU——而 AP 必须把初始控制帧填充得足够长，以覆盖设备所声明的 EMLSR 填充时延（padding delay）。在突发期间，设备只在那一条链路上工作，不得在其他 EMLSR 链路上收发。交换结束后，设备会在经过其 EMLSR 切换时延（transition delay）后，回到在所有链路上侦听的状态。

blocks.en: EMLMR — Enhanced Multi-Link Multi-Radio — is the opposite trade. Here the device does have multiple radios spread across links, but instead of running them all at modest capability, it pools their chains. When the AP starts a frame exchange on one link, the device reassigns transmit and receive chains (and the spatial streams they enable) from the other links onto the active one — briefly making that one link much faster than any single link could be on its own. The standard calls moving chains between links 'EMLMR link switching'.
blocks.zh: EMLMR——增强型多链路多射频（Enhanced Multi-Link Multi-Radio）——则是相反方向的折中。在这里，设备确实拥有分布在多条链路上的多套射频，但它不是让每套射频都以中等能力各自运行，而是把它们的链（chain）汇聚起来。当 AP 在某一条链路上发起帧交换时，设备会把发送链和接收链（以及由它们带来的空间流）从其他链路重新分配到当前活跃的这条链路上——短暂地让这一条链路远比任何单条链路自身能达到的速度更快。标准把这种在链路之间搬移链的动作称为“EMLMR 链路切换（EMLMR link switching）”。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 360 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><text x='180' y='18' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='13'>EMLSR vs EMLMR</text><text x='90' y='42' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11'>EMLSR: one radio</text><rect x='30' y='55' width='50' height='28'/><text x='55' y='73' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='9'>radio</text><line x1='80' y1='62' x2='150' y2='62'/><text x='160' y='66' text-anchor='start' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='9'>link A</text><line x1='80' y1='76' x2='150' y2='76' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><text x='160' y='80' text-anchor='start' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='9'>link B (listen)</text><text x='270' y='42' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11'>EMLMR: pool chains</text><rect x='210' y='52' width='44' height='20'/><rect x='210' y='78' width='44' height='20'/><text x='232' y='66' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>chain</text><text x='232' y='92' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>chain</text><line x1='254' y1='62' x2='300' y2='75'/><line x1='254' y1='88' x2='300' y2='75'/><line x1='300' y1='75' x2='340' y2='75'/><text x='320' y='100' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='9'>1 fast link</text><text x='180' y='150' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>EMLSR: cheap listening, one link at a time</text><text x='180' y='168' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>EMLMR: many chains stacked onto the active link</text></svg>

caption.en: EMLSR keeps one capable radio and merely listens on the other links; EMLMR has real radios on several links and concentrates their chains onto whichever link the burst is on.
caption.zh: EMLSR 只保留一套有能力的射频，在其他链路上仅做侦听；EMLMR 在多条链路上拥有真实的射频，并把它们的链集中到当前承载突发的那条链路上。

blocks.en: Both modes are turned on the same way: the device sends an EML Operating Mode Notification frame with the relevant mode bit set, names which links participate via a link bitmap, and the AP confirms. A transition timeout interval governs the handover so both sides agree exactly when the new mode takes effect. The shared idea is simple and powerful: don't pay for full simultaneous multi-link hardware you can't use all at once — keep links warm cheaply, then pour your real capability into whichever link the traffic actually lands on.
blocks.zh: 这两种模式的开启方式相同：设备发送一帧 EML 操作模式通知帧（EML Operating Mode Notification frame），置上相应的模式比特位，通过链路位图（link bitmap）指明哪些链路参与，AP 随后予以确认。一个切换超时间隔（transition timeout interval）来管理这次交接，使双方就新模式何时生效达成完全一致。两种模式背后的核心思想简单而有力：不要为你无法同时全部用上的“全时同步多链路”硬件买单——用很低的代价让各条链路保持“热身”状态，然后把你真正的能力全部倾注到流量实际落到的那条链路上。

summary.en: The exact listening, padding, and transition rules
summary.zh: 精确的侦听、填充与切换规则

blocks.en: Clause 35.3.17 defines EMLSR for a non-AP MLD with multiple receive chains: it listens on its EMLSR link(s) — CCA plus receiving the initial Control frame — while STAs on links whose bitmap bit is 0 doze. The initial Control frame must be an MU-RTS Trigger frame or a BSRP Trigger frame (BSRP response limited to one spatial stream), sent in a non-HT or non-HT duplicate PPDU at 6, 12, or 24 Mb/s, with its Padding field set so the MAC padding duration is at least the device's declared EMLSR Padding Delay. After responding, the STA must be capable of receiving a multi-spatial-stream PPDU a SIFS after its response on that link only, and not transmit/receive on the other EMLSR links until the exchange ends; it then returns to listening after the EMLSR Transition Delay. Clause 35.3.18 defines EMLMR for a non-AP MLD with multiple radios on multiple links: 'EMLMR link switching' moves transmit and receive chains from one link to another, and the device advertises an EMLMR Supported MCS And NSS Set in the EML Operating Mode Notification frame plus an EMLMR Padding Delay; during the burst it may receive and transmit PPDUs at up to that NSS on the link of the initial frame exchange, reverting to per-link capabilities after the EMLMR Transition Delay. Both modes are enabled via the EML Operating Mode Notification frame under a Transition Timeout interval.
blocks.zh: 35.3.17 节为具备多条接收链的非 AP MLD 定义了 EMLSR：它在其 EMLSR 链路上侦听——做 CCA 并接收初始控制帧——而位图比特位为 0 的链路上的 STA 则进入瞌睡（doze）状态。初始控制帧必须是 MU-RTS 触发帧或 BSRP 触发帧（BSRP 响应被限制为单条空间流），以 non-HT 或 non-HT duplicate PPDU 格式、用 6、12 或 24 Mb/s 发送，其 Padding 字段需设置得使 MAC 填充时长至少达到设备声明的 EMLSR 填充时延（EMLSR Padding Delay）。STA 响应之后，必须能在其响应之后一个 SIFS 仅在该链路上接收多空间流 PPDU，且在交换结束前不得在其他 EMLSR 链路上收发；随后在经过 EMLSR 切换时延（EMLSR Transition Delay）后回到侦听状态。35.3.18 节为在多条链路上具备多套射频的非 AP MLD 定义了 EMLMR：“EMLMR 链路切换”把发送链和接收链从一条链路搬移到另一条链路；设备在 EML 操作模式通知帧中通告一个 EMLMR Supported MCS And NSS Set，以及一个 EMLMR 填充时延（EMLMR Padding Delay）；在突发期间，它可在发生初始帧交换的那条链路上以至多该 NSS 收发 PPDU，并在 EMLMR 切换时延（EMLMR Transition Delay）后恢复到逐链路能力。两种模式都通过 EML 操作模式通知帧、在一个切换超时间隔（Transition Timeout interval）下启用。

cites.note: 35.3.17 EMLSR operation — listening on EMLSR links (CCA + initial Control frame), MU-RTS/BSRP initial Control frame in non-HT (duplicate) PPDU at 6/12/24 Mb/s, EMLSR padding delay, SIFS readiness for multi-SS PPDU, EMLSR transition delay, enable via EML Operating Mode Notification frame and transition timeout interval

35.3.18 EMLMR operation — multiple radios on multiple links, EMLMR link switching (moving Tx/Rx chains between links), EMLMR Supported MCS And NSS Set, EMLMR padding delay and transition delay, enable via EML Operating Mode Notification frame
